response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and geospatial experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust development in routing, navigation, or geospatial data pipeline contexts — key requirements for the role. Their C++ exposure is limited to academic/legacy NI LabWindows work, and their GIS projects use DLang and Node.js, not the required systems languages or routing tile optimization workflows.
strengths: Strong open-source geospatial project experience (GISCollective) with real-world NGO usage
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and learn new languages quickly
Demonstrated expertise in distributed systems and low-latency data pipelines from prior roles
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or map tiling systems
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not the required systems programming domain
Geospatial projects use DLang and JavaScript, not the C++/Rust stack critical for routing tiles
